findings.text: FIXED: the loading-skeleton is GONE. All three pacing frames (16%/50%/83%) show the fully-loaded 'Microplan portfolio' with the R6 - Attakar x Gura study card ('Reviewed' badge, 'Create solicitation' + 'Open study' buttons). The prior-iteration skeleton in the back two-thirds (the single RENDER finding that flipped the video to fail) no longer appears. Pacing/narration_fit raised accordingly.
At VO word 'portfolio' (32.2s) the cursor rests on the 'Create solicitation' button of the loaded R6 card - exact word->field match. Portfolio fully loaded across all pacing frames.

Every VO-word-mark lands on its field: title -> filled Solicitation Title, coverage/over -> Attakar x Gura coverage map, description -> Description being typed, type -> Type dropdown, public -> Publicly Listed checkbox, application -> Application Deadline, question -> Application Questions section. Strong word->field coherence.
Minor cosmetic (non-blocking): the application-deadline date shows a malformed year ('08/15/0020') in the 59.0s frame. Worth a date-picker default check.

Generate-with-AI flow reads correctly: 'Generate with AI' button visible at 71.3s, AI-drafted weighted criteria present (Field Enumeration Methodology 30, Reporting and Timeline 10), and the published confirmation ('Solicitation published - organizations can now apply', 'No responses yet') at 82.8s.

Manifest word-mark 'call' (78.5s) expects the coverage map but the frame shows the Create Solicitation / publish button - which is actually MORE coherent with 'publishes the call'. A manifest word->field mapping artifact, not a footage defect.

DEFER (known accepted limitation): narration says 'The scoring criteria Maya generated show right beside each question', but the respond form renders only the question text + answer textarea - no criteria are shown beside the questions. The visible coach panel ('Need help strengthening your application?') partially compensates, but the literal claim is not on screen. Word-marks (firm/call/question) all match their fields. This is the worst scene and sets the video verdict to warn.

RE-CONFIRMED: the AI Application Coach is fully present. VO 'application'/'coach' (100.7/101.4s) lands on the 'Get Feedback on My Answers' (#coach-btn), then a 'Reviewing... / Your coach is reviewing your answers' state, then a richly rendered feedback panel (QA specifics, 'Strengthen the three prior surveys claim', Suggested revision structure, 'Tips to Stand Out' with X/check examples and 'You're on the right track!'). Coach feedback substantive and legible.

DEFER (known accepted limitation): the responses table clips the right-edge Actions column ('ACT...'), so the Award trophy at the VO 'maya' mark (116.3s, expects has-text('Award')) is only partially visible. Substantive content matches narration - Sahel Field Research tied to 'R6 - Attakar x Gura' coverage, Submitted, Pending review - so coherence holds despite the clip.

Clean, honest closeout. VO 'award' (123.2s) lands on the green 'Awarded to Sahel Field Research / The organization has been notified' card. Award detail (org, Survey call, Award budget N500,000, Coverage area R6 - Attakar x Gura, 'Awarded & notified ... notification sent') fully shown, and the 'Next step - not yet built' disclaimer matches narration exactly. Confirmation card is appropriately static across pacing frames (hold, not stall).
